title: Moroccan Vermicelli Delight
description: A flavorful and aromatic Moroccan-inspired dish made with vermicelli pasta, delicate spices, and a hint of yeasty goodness.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available in most grocery stores or online

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the Moroccan spice blend and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the yeast extract (if using) and cook for another minute.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the pan with the spice blend.
Toss the pasta with the spice blend until well coated.
Season with salt, black pepper, parsley, and cilantro.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
Enjoy as a vegetarian main course or side dish!
